Hello, I’m Shan Sai!

A Bachelor of Science in Information Technology student majoring in Cybersecurity from Ateneo de Davao University. I build secure, useful, and user-centered digital solutions through web development, networking, and ethical technology.

Featured Work

Selected projects I’ve worked on.

Academic and development projects focused on usability, secure technology, systems thinking, and practical problem-solving.

Capstone System
2025 — 2026 GitHub

Blockchain-Based Traceability for Donated Educational Assets

A capstone traceability system that links donated educational assets with QR codes and web tracking for transparency and accountability.

Capstone QR Tracking Web Tracking Documentation
POS + Inventory
2026 GitHub

Taiwan Fried Kitchen POS & Inventory System

A centralized POS and inventory platform with order processing, manual stock updates, EOD audits, reports, and role-based access.

SIA POS Inventory RBAC
Student System
2023 GitHub

Mini-AdDU-SIS

A front-end student information system for viewing grades and encoding academic records through structured forms.

HTML CSS Forms UI
React App
2023 GitHub

React Shopping Cart Application

A simple React e-commerce app with product browsing, cart management, routing, and checkout flow.

React Routing Components State

About Me

A focused learner in cybersecurity and technology.

I enjoy building practical digital solutions that combine usability, security, and thoughtful design.

Technology with purpose, security, and responsibility.

I aim to grow as a technology professional who values discipline, integrity, lifelong learning, and service.

Location Davao City, Philippines
Focus Cybersecurity, Networking, and Development
Formation Ateneo de Davao University
Skills

Technical focus areas.

A concise view of the areas I continue to practice through coursework, projects, and self-learning.

01

Cybersecurity

Security fundamentals, threat awareness, ethical practices, privacy, and penetration testing basics.

02

Networking

Network design, troubleshooting, addressing, connectivity, documentation, and secure networking concepts.

03

Web Development

HTML, CSS, JavaScript, responsive layouts, forms, GitHub, and user-focused web interfaces.

04

Front-End Development

React, reusable components, clean UI layouts, mobile responsiveness, and accessibility-minded design.
